summary: Independent correction review resolved all eight prior findings. The PRD trace, 20 acceptance criteria, production CLI paths, strict evidence controls, genome lifecycle, specialist routing, and persistent learning behavior are backed by focused tests plus a full 3,877-test CI run with zero failures.

evidence.detail: Six required capabilities and twenty acceptance criteria remain the delivery authority.
Final QA maps every capability and all eight remediated findings to executable evidence.

specification_fidelity.residual_risk: No product-scope deviation or unresolved specification contradiction remains.

evidence.detail: 20 of 20 acceptance criteria covered; zero missing and zero weak.

acceptance_coverage.residual_risk: No acceptance criterion lacks an assertion-bearing test.

evidence.detail: 3,877 tests; 3,876 passed; zero failed; one expected skip.

code_health.residual_risk: The pre-existing prompt-size budget advisory is non-blocking and was not introduced by this feature.

evidence.detail: Real held-out execution, controlled genome A/B, static-score refusal, and traversal checks pass.
Worker truth, retry history, escalation timestamps, and specialist routing checks pass.
Live provider, explicit claim-source mapping, and unverifiable-state checks pass.
Operational compilation and inactive lifecycle cleanup checks pass.

runtime_truth.residual_risk: No mocked success path substitutes for the production CLI contracts under review.

evidence.detail: Resource monitoring, compatibility, security boundaries, and the remaining advisory are recorded explicitly.
No whitespace errors; only expected Windows line-ending warnings.

residual_risk.residual_risk: No open blocker remains for Gate D; prompt-size tuning remains ordinary follow-up debt.
